answeredQuestions.core-problem: No simple, cheap, trustworthy reference app demonstrating a grounded AI agent that plans tours and explains real artworks
answeredQuestions.solution-approach: GPT-4o vision agent on Azure OpenAI grounded in the keyless CC0 Met Collection API, React chat + gallery frontend, azd/Terraform/Container Apps deploy
answeredQuestions.target-users: Curious museum visitors, HVE learners/engineers, demo presenters
answeredQuestions.goals: Ground every answer in public-domain Met works, demonstrate agentic tour planning, keep POC low-cost, one-command deploy/teardown, vision-based artwork explanation
answeredQuestions.functional-requirements: search_collection, get_object, list_departments, find_related tools; POST /chat; vision explanation; build_tour; grounding guardrail; batched cached fetch; React gallery; azd up/down
answeredQuestions.non-functional-requirements: Scale-to-zero idle cost, grounded/safe content only, bounded fan-out, simple stack, portability, no secrets in code

referencesProcessed.keyFindings: Goal, non-goals, architecture, four Met tools, N+1 guardrail, cost controls, chat-completions implementation notes
Monorepo layout, run/test/deploy instructions, POST /chat example, cost note

nextActions: Refine build_tour (FR-007) acceptance criteria and tour definition (Q-001)
Confirm deploy region for gpt-4o capacity (Q-003)
Deploy first draft via azd up
